prompt: The user explicitly activated Grill and asks to save this discussion for later recovery. No handoff is near, there is no settled-plus-open discriminator, and only two real branches remain.
must: treat the explicit save or later-resume request as independently sufficient usefulness under the existing explicit Grill authority
write only the supporting discussion checkpoint through the canonical transaction
must_not: require handoff, a settled conclusion plus open discriminator, or three branches before saving
treat usefulness as activation or broader implementation authority
claim this offline authored case proves live model behavior
evidence: Offline static discussion-contract fixture; it isolates the explicit-save usefulness trigger and does not prove live model behavior.
